[{"timestamp":183000,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_string":"image","mark_content":"","content":"対面録音と通話録音の2つのモードを提供。
 • 日常環境での対面録音に対応。
 • 電話で会話の際は、通話録音可能。
 • 様々な仕事や生活シーンに適応し、製品の汎用性を向上。","title":"Plaud Note Pro","expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"https://plaud-welcome-files-online.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/images/20250917-103540.png","mark_id":null,"ocr_data_link":null,"link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":null,"picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":null,"mark_status":null,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null},{"timestamp":240000,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_string":"image","mark_content":"","content":"対面録音と通話録音を搭載したポータブルレコーダー。高いコストパフォーマンスと多様なシーンでの活用を実現します。
 • Note Proとの差別化を意識した位置付け。
 • 対面と通話の２つのモードが主な録音ニーズに対応。
 • 価格と機能のバランスがとれ、コストパフォーマンスの高さを強調。","title":"Plaud Note","expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"https://plaud-welcome-files-online.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/images/20250917-103618.png","mark_id":null,"ocr_data_link":null,"link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":null,"picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":null,"mark_status":null,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null},{"timestamp":279000,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_string":"image","mark_content":"","content":"世界で最も携帯性に優れた、簡単に取り付け可能なウェアラブル ボイスレコーダー。
 • 「最も携帯性に優れた」録音デバイスとして定義。
 • 装着型の体験を提供し、使用のハードルを下げる。
 • 従来型レコーダーとの差別化を図り、「瞬間を逃さず捉える」ミニマルな利用シーンを狙う。","title":"Plaud NotePin","expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"https://plaud-welcome-files-online.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/images/20250917-103622.png","mark_id":null,"ocr_data_link":null,"link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":null,"picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":null,"mark_status":null,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null}]
